ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Off Calendar

Re-Notice Of Hearing On Request For Entry Of Default Judgment In Unlimited Jurisdiction Case; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Luke N. Eaton, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, SUNTECH AMERICA, INC., a Delaware corporation.
Paul Toan sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ERICKSON ELECTRICAL CONTRACTORS INC., a Florida corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $69,999.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the rate of 18%: $53,402.44
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $410.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $124,811.44
Judgment signed in open court.
